headline: The Ultimate Guide to REITs: Strategies to Buy, Hold, and Profit

headline: American Tower Corporation Prices Senior Notes Offering
summary: BOSTON, March 11, 2025--American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT) today announced the pricing of its registered public offering of senior unsecured notes due 2030 and 2035 in aggregate principal amounts of $650.0 million and $350.0 million, respectively. The 2030 notes will have an interest rate of 4.900% per annum and are being issued at a price equal to 99.846% of their face value. headline: American Tower Corporation Declares Quarterly Distribution
summary: BOSTON, March 06, 2025--American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash distribution of $1.70 per share on shares of the Company’s common stock. The distribution is payable on April 28, 2025 to the stockholders of record at the close of business on April 11, 2025.
